nasb.text: She also gave the savory food and the bread, which she had made, to her son Jacob.

esv.text: And she put the delicious food and the bread, which she had prepared, into the hand of her son Jacob.

cnv.text: 然後，她把自己所預備美味的食物和餅，放在她兒子雅各的手裡。

ccb.text: 然后把做好的美味和饼交给雅各。

csbs.text: 然后把自己做好的美食和饼，交在她儿子雅各的手中。
